_provenance: PA-18: Hand-authored. Schema-derived from the live all-none fixture (frozen_portfolio_strip_all_none.json — captured from live alphabot_state.db on 2026-05-18). Represents the operator-visible buggy state: snapshot.portfolio_strip is all-None because EOD capture stored Nones, but accounts_map is populated with two symphonies having current_value > 0. Used to pin that /api/state frozen branch recomputes portfolio_strip on-the-fly from accounts_map instead of passing through captured Nones.
description: Snapshot with portfolio_strip all-None AND accounts_map populated. Frozen path must recompute portfolio_strip via analytics, not pass through Nones.
